overall.description: A cyberpunk-themed video game scene featuring a character with a glowing purple cybernetic arm and red mohawk sitting on a bench in a futuristic transit station. The camera slowly orbits around the character, revealing neon-lit corridors, reflective marble floors, and sparse background pedestrian traffic.

agents.ego_description: sitting on metal bench with arms crossed, looking away from camera toward the station corridor

notable_agents.action: standing figure visible in the distant corridor background

entered.detail: sleek metal bench with curved armrests where the character is seated
tall glass wall with metal framing separating the waiting area from adjacent spaces
open corridor leading deeper into the transit station with visible signage
ambient purple and cyan neon lighting reflecting off the polished floor surfaces

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a futuristic transit station with the ego character seated on a metal bench. The camera slowly orbits clockwise around the character, who sits with arms crossed looking away toward a glass-walled corridor. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves through the background corridor while neon purple lighting casts reflections across the polished marble floor.

events.description: character turns head from looking left to directly facing the camera

agents.ego_description: sitting on bench and turning head to face the camera, maintaining eye contact with a neutral expression

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking through the distant station corridor

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow orbit toward the front of the character, the ego turns their head to face the camera, revealing red sunglasses and facial details. The neon-lit station environment remains consistent with background pedestrians continuing to move through the distant corridor. The perspective shift reveals more of the bench structure and the character's cybernetic arm details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, clockwise orbital camera movement that shifts from a profile view of a seated figure to a direct frontal reveal within a futuristic transit station. It begins with the character sitting on a metal bench with arms crossed, looking away toward a glass-walled corridor where sparse pedestrian traffic moves under neon purple lighting. As the camera continues its smooth arc, the polished marble floors reflect the vibrant glow of the station while the perspective gradually shifts toward the front of the subject. The scene then culminates as the character turns their head to face the lens, revealing red sunglasses and the intricate details of a cybernetic arm against the backdrop of the distant, bustling corridor.
